victorychart.categories: {x: ['Amazon Marketplace','Whole Foods Market','Delta Airlines Inc','Marriott Hotels & Resorts','Uber Technologies','Office Depot LLC','Staples Business Advantage','FedEx Shipping Services','Southwest Airlines','Target Corporation']}

victoryaxis.tickformat: ['Amazon Marketplace','Whole Foods Market','Delta Airlines Inc','Marriott Hotels & Resorts','Uber Technologies','Office Depot LLC','Staples Business Advantage','FedEx Shipping Services','Southwest Airlines','Target Corporation']
victoryaxis.style: {axis: {stroke: 'transparent'}, ticks: {stroke: 'transparent'}, grid: {stroke: 'transparent'}, tickLabels: {fill: '#76847E', fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 500, fontFamily: 'Expensify Neue', padding: 24}}

{axis: {stroke: 'transparent'}, ticks: {stroke: 'transparent'}, grid: {stroke: '#E6E1DA', strokeWidth: 1}, tickLabels: {fill: '#76847E', fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 500, fontFamily: 'Expensify Neue', padding: 8}}

victorybar.data: [{x: 'Amazon Marketplace', y: 9450},{x: 'Whole Foods Market', y: 8200},{x: 'Delta Airlines Inc', y: 7600},{x: 'Marriott Hotels & Resorts', y: 6900},{x: 'Uber Technologies', y: 6100},{x: 'Office Depot LLC', y: 5400},{x: 'Staples Business Advantage', y: 4800},{x: 'FedEx Shipping Services', y: 3900},{x: 'Southwest Airlines', y: 3200},{x: 'Target Corporation', y: 2500}]
